title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
